description_long: This is a classic upright arcade game cabinet themed for 'Fix It Felix Jr.', featuring a predominantly light blue exterior. The front panel displays a large rectangular screen area surrounded by cartoon artwork, including character faces and brick motifs, with a marquee at the top labeled 'FIX IT FELIX JR.' in bold blue letters on a yellow background. The control panel below the screen includes a joystick and several round buttons, with a black area that may represent a coin slot or instruction panel. Both side panels are decorated with large, oval-shaped illustrations of the main character, Felix, holding a hammer, with bricks and another character in the background, all set against the same blue backdrop. The back panel is plain and unadorned, matching the cabinet's overall color. The cabinet is constructed with a sturdy, boxy shape and a slightly protruding control panel for ergonomic gameplay.
description: A light blue upright 'Fix It Felix Jr.' arcade cabinet with cartoon artwork, a marquee, and a joystick/button control panel. Side panels feature large character illustrations, while the back is plain.
description_view_0: Front view showing the marquee, screen area, control panel with joystick and buttons, and cartoon artwork around the display.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the large oval illustration of Felix and another character with bricks, and the 'FIX IT FELIX JR.' label at the top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, unadorned blue back panel with no artwork or features.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with the same large oval illustration and label at the top.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, flat front with a visible bezel, medium size typical of classic arcade machines
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and multiple round buttons, arranged in a row, with a dark panel area possibly for instructions or coin slot
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features 'FIX IT FELIX JR.' in blue text on a yellow background, with cartoon character faces and brick motifs, matching the playful theme
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels display large oval illustrations of Felix holding a hammer, with bricks and another character, set against a light blue background and topped with the 'FIX IT FELIX JR.' label
